title: Cleisostoma complanatum
taxonomy: Cleisostoma complanatum is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Cleisostoma complanatum is further classified as a genus within the subtribe Aeridinae. The species is part of the tribe Aeridinae, which is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habits. Cleisostoma complanatum's classification is closely related to its evolutionary history and adaptation to its environment.

intro: Cleisostoma complanatum, also known as the flat Cleisostoma orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical forests in Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Cleisostoma complanatum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
